title: Looking for help with building scalable project overview boards
excerpt: We’ve been using Monday.com for a few months, so are familiar with the basics of boards, automations, dashboards etc. but need some expertise in setting up summary boards to manage multiple projects and get an accurate o…

posts.author: BGI (Ann Masson)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve been using Monday.com for a few months, so are familiar with the basics of boards, automations, dashboards etc. but need some expertise in setting up summary boards to manage multiple projects and get an accurate overview of tasks and resourcing with new work coming in.

We’re a small remote working team with limited time for trial and error in implementing the ability to scale up, so looking for expertise to get on the right track from the start.

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @BGI

Welcome to the community!

To give your stakeholders, audience members, assistants, or colleagues some insight into what your projects are all about, it’s important to set up a summary board. By using a summary board template you can clearly and concisely describe the vital points of the project, keeping your group well informed. In a glance, you can gain insight into the status of each, progress, client, all the way to the timeline. Similarly, you can add new projects to the template, and modify schedules for each project straight from the summary board.

If you’re looking to implement a summary board for your organization, hiring experts from a monday.com consulting company is the ideal choice. They will not just create a better project overview structure but also offer the key to regulating resources.
